narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: CC: Criticism of institutions and authorities
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: White Garcetti was away, Los Angeles continued to struggle with the high crime and homelessness that have come to define his legacy, as well as a crisis in the City Council triggered by racist comments from City Council members within Garcetti’s party.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement challenges the competence and priorities of Mayor Garcetti and his administration, suggesting he is neglecting pressing local issues in favor of a global climate summit, thereby questioning his integrity and effectiveness as an authority.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: It is not clear why the conference could not be held remotely.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement implicitly challenges the motives and practical judgment of the climate movement (represented by the C40 summit), suggesting its actions are performative or inefficient rather than genuinely focused on reducing emissions.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: burning fossil fuels on an international flight rather than attending remotely and attending to pressing issues at home.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: CC: Criticism of institutions and authorities
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: though L.A.’s infrastructure is not widely considered “high-quality.” A proposed high-speed rail between L.A. and San Francisco has been largely canceled, and current passenger rail service from L.A. to San Diego has been suspended because of a potential landslide hazard.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote criticizes the competence and effectiveness of the local government and its infrastructure projects, undermining the authority's claims and actions related to climate and transportation policy.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: White Garcetti was away, Los Angeles continued to struggle with the high crime and homelessness that have come to define his legacy, as well as a crisis in the City Council triggered by racist comments from City Council members within Garcetti’s party.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: By contrasting the mayor's international climate activism with pressing domestic problems, the text implicitly criticizes the climate movement's priorities, suggesting it diverts attention and resources from more immediate local issues.
